reviews.review_title: Devil may cry and then some in vr...
reviews.review_description:
Best way I can describe this game is kinda like devil may cry in vr but also add in other elements like both magic spells and imbuing your weapons with different magic abilities, then top all that off with co op and its even more fun...the amount of combinations you can do with weapons and skills and spells can be overwhelming but the more you mess with it, the more you get the hang of the different things you can do...

My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed opportunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I don't see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I received a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.

I played it on Quest 3. The graphics are very poor compared to the PC version. And the graphics are poor even by Quest 2 standards. Low resolution, blurry textures, no special effects. Also, there's no single-player campaign like on PC version. Quest only has single-player missions. The PC version is definitely better.

reviews.review_title: This game is amazing, don't sleep
reviews.review_description: Too bad there arent many people playing this game online co op, because the single player models official. When you put all of the options on, you can flip  in the air and shoot upside down (not for vr beginners), it's extremely fun to play. August 2025. Stamp that. Instant classic.
I feel like I was screwed - can't play it anymore since switching to the Pro headset.

reviews.review_title: Haven’t been able to load in for years
reviews.review_description: I thought this game was discontinued/banned so I gave up, but literally haven’t been able to play this for around 3 years? Can’t even load in, black screen then goes right back to Home Screen, I’d appreciate some help as this was my favorite game ever on quest 1

This is the most disorienting game but it is also the most fun i can do most of these flips in real life so the motion is nothing to me but im telling you this is an everyday play for me ill even play this craziness literally right before bed. There is something about running along the walls jumping off doing a side flip over the enemies going into slow motion with dual pistols all before landing jumping back to the wall to continue your mayhem.  This is 5/5 game in the fun department and i would recommend this game to anyone very comfortable in VR.

I really do like this game a lot and put some decent hours in it. But I'd like to see more love & updates put further into this game. It's already solid, & making improvements will only add to its successful status.
I install it but the game won't respond to the launch it just shuts down immediately I've tried to uninstalling it and reinstalling it and it still hasn't worked

developer_response.body: Hi there, so sorry to hear that you are unable to play the game after upgrading, it seems like it could be that the saved file has been corrupted. If you don't mind do you think you can backup your saved file and delete that from your device and see if it is able to be booted up?

reviews.review_title: This was my fave game until...
reviews.review_description: This was my favorite game until, after 2 years, I went to play and now it's stuck on slow. Meaning that, instead of slowing time by choice, it's constant. What happened? I've checked my settings and it's nothing on my end. Pls help for fuel stars
How do you do a flip

developer_response.body: Hey there! You can do a flip by enabling it in the options, once you have enabled it, jump and put both your hands in the air to flip. :)

reviews.review_description:
I had this game on psvr and decided to grab the quest version (on a quest 2). It's different in a bad way. Campaign is gone and the enemies just run to you so you can basically stay in a small section of the map and just let them come to you. I was really disappointed that I wasn't buying the same game that I had owned. 

Positives, controls ans movement are good........yea......buy a different version is my recommendation. I give the psvr one 5 stars.
This game doesn't work on the pro for some reason.
Best gameplay for VR!

reviews.review_title: It's good but where is the seated mode?
reviews.review_description: Game is nice to play and makes a lot of fun, but I can not find the seated game mode option that is advertised on the store page.
i tried to replay the game after couple years and i can’t log on it’s just says app info or close app i’ve tried restarting vr and uninstalling game and it won’t work

developer_response.body: Hi there, it could be that the saved file has been corrupted, if you don't mind would you try deleting your saved file and trying it again?

reviews.review_title: Why doesn't it work on my quest 2?
reviews.review_description:
This app has worked on my quest 1 but has never worked for me on any Quest 2 and it is my favorite game. I have uninstalled and reinstalled and still doesn't work....sad face.

HD reached out and had me delete the game, log off wi-fi, shut down, log on, and re-download. It worked!

developer_response.body:
Hi ceremarie, we'd love to help you look further into your issue. We'll need your logs to help us better identify the source of the error. Could you send us the file in this directory : 

This PC\Quest 2\Internal shared storage\Android\data\com.mixedrealms.sairentovruntethered

Kindly send us an email at support@mixedrealms.com so that we can help you more closely. Please include your username, the file, and a quick description of the issue so we'll know it's you. :)

reviews.review_description:
I spent about a half hour trying to make sense of this game. Got through the tutorial although I did not understand half the settings it was making me select. The load out section was almost entirely unintelligible and then in the first mission I could see my weapons but couldn’t actually grab hold of them, so it was two minutes of nothing.

It may be an okay game, who knows? Needs massive improvements in on boarding new players though. No excuse for being so obscure.

developer_response.body:
Hey geekraver, we are sorry the game didn't meet your expectations. You should be able to grab your melee weapons by pressing the trigger button over your shoulder, and for guns it should be pressing the trigger around your hips. The default loadout is set to dual swords!

Thank you, and we are grateful you still gave Sairento Untethered a chance :)

reviews.review_description:
I was underwhelmed with this at first, having played the SteamVR version. But I fiddled with the (considerable) options to enable full locomotion and the more brilliant silly stuff like gliding, slo-mo backflips and changing katana grip angle to 'stab'.

And then it blew my mind. It encourages creative and varied play, and the more ridiculous you try to be, the more the game rises to meet you. Zipping through the air headshotting with your Deckard-style pistols and then grabbing your katanas as you land to eviscerate the fool behind you... It's incredible. It seems to have the single goal of making you feel like an unstoppable future ninja and gives you all the tools to make that happen. 

It's scrappier than the likes of Robo Recall, but the team behind this obviously has a lot of passion and talent and the feel is perfect. It's a complete steal at this price and represents a real jewel in the Quest's crown. The more you play it, the more it demands to be played.

I know that trade-offs had to be made from the Steam version, and I don't really care - but what I do miss is the missions where you move between areas, like the compartments of a train. Arenas are all very well, but I'm sure that a bit of jiggery pokery would allow discrete rooms for the player to move between once all of the enemies in one had been killed.

Also, I really love the way that stealth works in this game and I wish there was more of it. There's nothing like dropping from the rafters and stabbing someone in the back before being spotted, or picking off the scouts one by one from the towers.

One last thing - the kurisigama is bloody astonishing. Thank you Mixed Realms for a stunning game - I can't wait to see where you take it and I'm glad to be on board.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kinds words. They mean a lot to us! Indeed a lot of stuffs had to be decked down due to the FPS requirements. However we have started the process of optimizing our assets to see how much more we can further push this game. Definitely we have the heart n soul to push this as far as we can so do stay tuned for more stuffs! :) And we like to say thanks again for the support!

reviews.review_description: If you like close comeback at games like me.... Then I will recommend this game. This games makes you feel like a Awesome.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your awesome review! :)

reviews.review_description: Had the game for only a matter of days but it's not working anymore, played maybe 5 times between my husband and I. It no longer offers tier 1 2 or 3 battles, just 4-6 and that doesn't work if your just learning the game or a newbie to vr. Not worth the money and a total rip off because since it's been played for over 2 hours we can't return it for our money. I thought it was a great game until today, but I feel like it's garbage for taking away content it previously had. Oh and this is all used while off line. I would give a 0 star rating if that was possible...

developer_response.body: Hello, We are sorry to hear that you are having a bad experience with the game. We would like to help you to fix the problems. Could you email to support@mixedrealms.com about how this issue occur, steps to reproduce and, it would be nice if you could send us your save files so that we can investigate further.
